_comment: Hand-labeled ground-truth set seeded from real RSG tickets. label = expected primary category; auxTags = expected co-occurring tags; notes = why / known pitfall. Used by test-eval.ts to score the classifier.

tickets.label: ORDER_TRACKING
tickets.notes: PO info was in an attachment the old code failed to parse; should still resolve as a tracking request.

tickets.label: CANCELLATION_REQUEST
tickets.notes: Old code parsed as tracking but missed the cancellation context.

tickets.notes: Customer asking to confirm price.

tickets.notes: Subject 'Price and availability please.' — a price+availability ask. Price/product-info blends are acceptable either way; labeled price_confirmation to match the explicit pricing ask.

tickets.notes: Old code returned not-found but the order WAS retrievable — fuzzy-match gap to fix.
